checks.detail: All registered spec and canonical artifact files are present.
checks.name: Required artifact presence

checks.detail: All registered identifiers are unique and match the accepted format.
checks.name: Identifier uniqueness and naming

checks.detail: All identifier references resolve to registered identifiers or artifacts.
checks.name: Cross-artifact reference resolution

checks.detail: All dependency edges flow downstream according to the authority graph.
checks.name: Authority and dependency direction

checks.detail: All canonical JSON artifacts reproduce declared canonical payload hashes.
checks.name: Canonical machine-form reproducibility

checks.detail: All schema files are parseable JSON Schema stubs with the declared draft marker.
checks.name: Schema validation of canonical artifacts

checks.detail: Valid specification-coherence fixture produced expected PASS.
checks.name: Declared valid fixtures pass

checks.detail: Invalid duplicate-ID and forbidden-dependency fixtures produced expected FAIL states.
checks.name: Declared invalid fixtures fail as expected

checks.detail: Fixture evaluation preserves PASS, FAIL, and NOT_CHECKED as distinct states.
checks.name: PASS/FAIL/NOT_CHECKED state preservation

checks.detail: All current input files are digestable; final SHA256SUMS will be emitted after receipt generation.
checks.name: Input and output digest coverage

does_not_establish: Implementation conformance of the full experimental apparatus
Legal, regulatory, institutional, or policy sufficiency
Truth of the Boundary Language thesis
establishes: The materialized Fork Claim Boundary specification stack was evaluated for specification coherence under the recorded runner and environment.
Required artifacts, identifiers, references, dependency direction, canonical payload hashes, schema stubs, fixtures, result-state preservation, and digestability were evaluated.

next_required_action: If PASS, proceed to implementation conformance fixtures for schemas, scorers, and BES.
If FAIL, classify each defect and issue a versioned correction without historical substitution.
Preserve this receipt and all input artifacts as the v0.1 lineage.

overall_reason.detail: Specification-coherence checks executed against the materialized v0.1 artifact stack.

receipt_integrity.canonicalization: UTF-8; JSON keys sorted lexicographically; compact separators; no NaN/Infinity; /receipt_integrity excluded from payload digest
